text:
Upon execution of the StartV4 script of ETHOberonV4 the
message "/usr/local/lib/ETHOberonV4/oberon: can't load dynamic linker
'/lib/ld.so'" is printed out. The executable is a ZMAGIC - the file command
(root# file /usr/local/lib/ETHOberonV4/oberon) says:
/usr/local/lib/ETHOberonV4/oberon: Linux/i386 demand-paged executable
(ZMAGIC)

Fix: 

Unfortunately don't know.

How-To-Repeat: Execute StartV4.
